authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §5.85(a)(1) — Trout, General Statewide Regulations (inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW (Hidden Lake, Olympic Valley, not listed)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: OpenStreetMap / Nominatim — "Hidden Lake" water feature (way 187077056), Olympic Valley, Placer County, CA (used because the USGS GNIS ArcGIS gazetteer (nationalmap.gov geonames MapServer/7) has no queryable record for a "Hidden Lake" in Placer County, CA)
sources.quotedText: {"osm_type":"way","osm_id":187077056,"lat":"39.2078017","lon":"-120.2168727","class":"water","type":"lake","name":"Hidden Lake","display_name":"Hidden Lake, Olympic Valley, Placer County, California, United States"}

parameters.note: Hidden Lake is a small (~1 acre) lake set within the Hidden Lake Loop residential subdivision in Olympic Valley (Squaw Valley), Placer County — in the Truckee River (Lake Tahoe outlet) drainage, NOT a Lake Tahoe tributary, so the §7.50(b)(152) Lake Tahoe tributary closure does not apply. It is not listed in CCR §7.40(b) or §7.50(b), so it falls under the general statewide lake regulation in §5.85(a)(1) (which by its terms governs all inland lakes and ponds, 'including those on private lands'). No public-access, fish, or stocking information was found; it does not appear in CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document. verifyCurrent flagged because access appears to be residential/community and was not independently confirmed.
